_comment: Canonical TribunalCommand model. Records Tribunal command generation results and all metadata with investigation_id reference. g8ee is the authority — it creates these documents in its SQLite store and syncs to g8es. g8ed can query via g8ee HTTP API for audit and analytics.
_consumers: g8ed (JS — queries via g8ee HTTP API for tribunal command history and analytics)
g8ee (SQLite — creates and updates tribunal commands, syncs to g8es)

tribunal_command._description: Full Tribunal command generation record with investigation reference. Captures all Tribunal pipeline metadata including candidate commands, voting breakdown, verifier decisions, and final outcome.

investigation_id.description: Associated investigation ID. Links this Tribunal command to the investigation that triggered it.

case_id.description: Associated case ID. Denormalized for query efficiency without investigation lookup.

created_at.description: When the Tribunal command generation was initiated

updated_at.description: When the record was last updated

request.description: Caller's natural-language request that seeded the Tribunal

guidelines.description: Caller's optional guidelines on command shape passed to the Tribunal

model.description: LLM model used for Tribunal generation

num_passes.description: Number of generation passes performed (default 5, one per Tribunal member)

final_command.description: Command string produced by the Tribunal pipeline; null when outcome=consensus_failed

outcome.description: Tribunal pipeline outcome. See tribunal.json tribunal.outcomes.

vote_winner.description: Command string that won the uniform majority vote; null when outcome=consensus_failed

vote_score.description: Fraction of members who voted for the winner (winner_count / total_members); null when outcome=consensus_failed

candidates._description: All candidate commands generated by Tribunal members

pass_index.description: Zero-based index of the generation pass that produced this candidate

member.description: Tribunal member that produced this candidate

vote_breakdown._description: Full per-member vote attribution, dissent clusters, and tie-break record

candidates_by_command.description: normalised command -> list of member_ids that produced it

winner.description: Normalised command that won the vote; null on consensus_failed

dissenters_by_command.description: losing normalised command -> list of member_ids that produced it

consensus_strength.description: Ratio of winning-cluster member count to total Tribunal members

tie_broken.description: True when more than one cluster held the highest vote and a tie-break rule resolved it

tie_break_reason.description: Which tie-break rule resolved the tie (if any)

verifier_passed.description: True if the verifier approved the vote winner (or an equivalent dissenter cluster)

verifier_revision.description: Revised command produced by the verifier when verifier_passed=false

swap_to_cluster.description: Opaque cluster id the Verifier swapped to (set only on reason=swapped_to_dissenter)

consensus_confidence.description: Qualitative consensus confidence level derived from quantitative metrics

execution_duration_ms.description: Total Tribunal pipeline execution duration in milliseconds

error_context._description: Error information when Tribunal pipeline fails

error_type.description: Type of Tribunal error that occurred

pass_errors.description: Per-pass error messages when multiple passes fail
